summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 'Move Items Between Accounts' functionality. All backend API tests (10/10) and frontend UI tests (10/10) passed. The feature allows users to select items from one account and move them to another existing account on the same divided table.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with PIN 0000 - returns token and user data
Backend: GET /api/tables - returns tables with correct status (Mesa 3 = divided)
Backend: GET /api/tables/{table_id}/orders - returns 4 accounts for Mesa 3
Backend: POST /api/orders/{id}/move-items endpoint exists and validates input
Backend: Move items requires target_order_id (400 if missing)
Backend: Move items validates item_ids exist in source order
Backend: Successfully moves items between accounts
Backend: Order totals update correctly after move
Backend: Move to same order handled correctly
Backend: Move items requires authentication (401 without token)
Frontend: Login con PIN 0000 (Admin) - navigates to Dashboard
Frontend: Navegación al mapa de mesas - MAPA DE MESAS visible
Frontend: Mesa 3 dividida visible en mapa (naranja/striped pattern)
Frontend: Mesa 3 tiene 4 cuentas (#5, #7, #8, #9)
Frontend: Funcionalidad 'Dividir' entra en modo selección de ítems
Frontend: Selección de ítem individual en modo dividir (highlight)
Frontend: Botón 'Mover a Cuenta' aparece después de seleccionar ítems
Frontend: Botones 'Mover aquí (#X)' aparecen para otras cuentas
Frontend: Clic en 'Mover aquí' mueve el ítem correctamente
Frontend: Totales de ambas cuentas se actualizan después del movimiento
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Mesa 3 has 4 accounts (#5, #7, #8, #9) with items.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Move Items Between Accounts functionality fully tested and working. The flow is: 1) Go to divided table (Mesa 3), 2) Click 'Dividir', 3) Select items, 4) Click 'Mover a Cuenta', 5) Click 'Mover aquí (#X)' on target account. Items are moved and totals update correctly.

move_items_between_accounts.items_transfer: Items moved from source to target order correctly
move_items_between_accounts.totals_update: Both source and target order totals update correctly

ui_elements.mover_a_cuenta_button: Purple button appears after selecting items
ui_elements.mover_aqui_buttons: Purple pulsing buttons appear on other accounts
ui_elements.desde_aqui_indicator: Yellow button shows current source account
ui_elements.cancelar_button: X button to exit move mode

table_map_visual.divided_indicator: Orange/striped pattern for tables with multiple accounts
table_map_visual.legend: Shows 'Dividida' in legend with orange color
